## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Agent/Copilot use disclosure

- [ ] No agent or Copilot assistance was used beyond basic autocomplete.
- [ ] Copilot Chat / Ask was used for explanation or review only.
- [ ] Agent mode or another tool-using agent was used.
- [ ] MCP tools were used.
- [ ] Terminal commands were suggested or run by an agent.

If agent mode, MCP, or terminal tools were used, summarize:

| Field | Answer |
| --- | --- |
| Agent/client |  |
| Tools enabled |  |
| MCP servers used |  |
| Terminal commands run |  |
| Sensitive files touched |  |
| Tests/checks run |  |
| Known failures/skipped checks |  |

## Security-sensitive areas

Check any touched area.

- [ ] Authentication or authorization
- [ ] Secrets or credentials
- [ ] Logging or telemetry
- [ ] Cryptography
- [ ] Input validation or output encoding
- [ ] CI/CD workflows
- [ ] IaC, deployment, Kubernetes, or cloud policy
- [ ] Dependencies or lockfiles
- [ ] Agent, prompt, MCP, or VS Code configuration
- [ ] None of the above

## Validation

- [ ] Diff matches the requested scope.
- [ ] Tests include relevant negative/abuse cases.
- [ ] SAST/secret/dependency checks passed or findings are documented.
- [ ] Agent-authored code was reviewed by a human.
- [ ] Any residual risk is documented below.

## Residual risk

List known tradeoffs, assumptions, skipped checks, or follow-up work.
